ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the flag of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the country data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country in that year */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the population */,
  "world_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the world population */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Urban population of the country */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Rural population of the country */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "birth_rate" REAL /* Birth rate per 1000 population */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Death rate per 1000 population */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy in years */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the population data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "area_data" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "area" TEXT /* Total area of the country */,
  "density_per_sq_km" REAL /* Density of the country per square kilometer */,
  "land_area" TEXT /* Land area of the country */,
  "water_area" TEXT /* Water area of the country */,
  "total_area" TEXT /* Total area of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the area data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area" TEXT /* Total area of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the region data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_regions" (
  "country_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country-region entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the country belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or client */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the access log was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
